ham.subject: Your SaaS subscription renewal notice – action required
ham.body:
Hello [Name],

We hope you are enjoying AcmeCloud services. This is a reminder that your subscription plan is set to expire on 20th April 2026. To continue uninterrupted access, please renew your subscription within the next 5 days.

Click here to renew: <URL>.

Dhanyavaad for choosing AcmeCloud.

Best regards,
AcmeCloud Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate action required from CEO
spam.body:
Dear [Name],

I am [CEO_NAME], CEO of XYZ Pvt Ltd. I noticed that your account has a pending balance of ₹10,000. To avoid any service disruption, I need you to redeem a gift card worth ₹12,000 immediately.

Please click the link below to complete the transaction:

<URL>

Thank you for your prompt action.

Regards,
[CEO_NAME]
